headline: Agentic SEO and local multi-agent systems led the month while a cluster of data-resilience techniques broke out.
body: SEO automation dominated the window, with agentic systems wiring Claude Code into Google Search Console to find keywords and deploy content, and a standalone AI SEO agent built on Agent OS. Local models and multi-agent delegation moved together as Gemma ran 10 subagents on a single machine above 170 tokens per second, and Cursor announced an agent-native platform where 95% of usage is now agents plus a model trained from scratch. NotebookLM expanded into a full agent doing code generation and program synthesis with a cloud computer. A new cluster of resilience techniques broke out, with data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection all entering as fresh outliers.
